creator: murray.stokely@windriver.com
text:
On Tue, Nov 20, 2001 at 11:19:22AM -0500, mwlucas@blackhelicopters.org wrote:
> The "file containing all PGP keys" does not appear to be in the doc
> distribution -- at least, it's not in *mine*, supped yesterday.

   It is a generated file, it will be built and installed when the web
tree is built.  This worked fine last I checked locally and it is
working fine on freefall right now.  This file (pgpkeyring.txt)
doesn't ever exist in the doc distribution, it gets built and
installed in your target directory from the PGP Keys chapter of the
Handbook.

	- Murray
